title: Demanding coach
publicBio: Clear framing, straight posture, technique above all. Doesn't shout, but doesn't let anything slide either.

medium.text: Go down further, you can do better.

medium: You're slowing down {name}. Get back on tempo.
I have nothing to correct for now {name}. Continue.

hard.text: Go all the way down {name}. Don't hold back.

hard: You have to hold this rhythm {name}.

hard.text: Take it {name}. You have what it takes.
All the way down, and you don't let go {name}.

hard: It's demanding, and that's exactly what we want {name}.

medium: Lick it like a job, not a hobby {name}.
hard: With application {name}. I want this flawless.

soft: Clean strikes on your cheek {name}, no softness.

soft.text: Maintain. It's a matter of discipline {name}.

medium.text: Don't come up before my signal {name}.
Count in your head {name}. You don't move.

hard: Don't pull off. Hold to the end {name}.

hard.text: Deep, still, until I say so {name}.

finale.text: We finish deep {name}. Don't let go.

finale: It's the last thing I'm asking of you. Do it right {name}.

soft: Breathe. Reset to a correct posture {name}.
Inhale deeply {name}. We start again cleanly.
Relax the jaw {name}, without dropping your focus.
You have this time {name}. Use it well.
Ask me for it properly: "I want more {coach}".
Say it clearly {name}, no stammering: "keep going, please {coach}".
I want to hear you phrase it properly.
medium: Repeat it, and well: "I need your cock {coach}".
Beg properly, or I won't listen.

soft: This moment is yours {name}. Don't waste it.
Show me what you can do on your own {name}.
Stroke it with your hand {name}, clean motion.
Help yourself with your hand properly {name}.
medium: Keep the pace with your hand {name}, don't drift.

randomComments: It's correct {name}. No more, no less.
I note what's wrong {name}. Correct it.
intros: I'm Hélène. I'll be demanding with you {name}. Prepare properly.
Hélène. Put your phone down, sit up straight, and listen. We begin {name}.
No leniency today {name}. You're going to work, and work well.
congrats: Correct {name}. You did what was needed.
Better than last time {name}. Keep it up.
You held the frame {name}. I don't have much to say against it.
encore: More? Fine. We start again, and you stay at level {name}.
You're asking for more {name}. Good. Don't drop your guard.

25: You're catching the rhythm {name}. Hold it.
50: You're keeping up. That's what I expect {name}.
75: You're approaching your limits {name}. Don't falter.
It's hard, and you're holding {name}. Correct.
90: You finish this cleanly {name}. Give what's left.

soft: You have a throat made for this {name}. Use it.
Lower {name}. That's where you actually work.
medium: Your depth is correct {name}. Push it.
hard: All the way down {name}. That's your worth.
A throat like yours doesn't get spared {name}.

soft: You do what I say {name}. That's the minimum.
medium: You execute without flinching {name}. That's what's expected.
hard: You do exactly what you're told {name}. Continue.

attempt: Today your throat works a little longer than usual {name}. It's within your range.
We're holding the throat engagement a notch higher {name}. No discussion.
record: You held the engagement longer than ever {name}. That's the level I expect now.
New threshold on your throat {name}. Acceptable. Very acceptable.
tapout: Your throat reached its limit for the day {name}. We stop there — cleanly, no drama.
Noted {name}. The throat said stop. We'll rework it, higher.

attempt: Today's throat hold will be longer {name}. Prepare to hold it.
When I tell you to hold deep {name}, you hold longer than usual. Discipline.
record: You held it deep longer than ever {name}. That's exactly the work.
Throat hold record {name}. I have nothing to say against it. That's rare.
tapout: You still held a good while {name}. The rest, another time.
The throat gave out {name}. That's a legitimate limit — we log it, we start from there.

attempt: You keep your mouth full longer today {name}. You don't swallow before my order.
Mouth discipline {name}: you hold it, one notch more than last time.
record: You held longer than ever {name}. That's pure discipline. Good.
New full-mouth record {name}. You obey correctly. Continue.
tapout: You held a correct while before swallowing {name}. Patience is trained.
Noted {name}. Next time, you hold longer.
